---
title: "PROJECT"
author: "Avery Cutright"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(shiny)
install.packages("shinydashboard")
library(shinydashboard)
install.packages("tidyverse")
library(tidyverse)
install.packages("DT")
library(DT)
install.packages("plotly")
library(plotly)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(out.width = "60%",fig.align='center')
```



```{r}
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
library(plotly)

# ── Data loading (Women's only) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
BASE_URL <- "https://media.githubusercontent.com/media/JeffreyRStevens/ncaavolleyballr/refs/heads/main/data-csv/"

divs  <- c(1, 2, 3)
years <- 2020:2024

build_url <- function(div, year) {
  paste0(BASE_URL, "wvb_playerseason_div", div, "_", year, ".csv")
}

# Raw counting stats that will be converted to per-game (per GP) rates
per_game_stats <- c(
  "Kills", "Errors", "Total Attacks", "Assists", "Aces",
  "SErr", "Digs", "RErr", "Block Solos", "Block Assists",
  "BErr", "PTS", "SrvAtt"
)

load_data <- function() {
  combos <- expand.grid(div = divs, year = years, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  dfs <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(combos)), function(i) {
    url <- build_url(combos$div[i], combos$year[i])
    tryCatch({
      df <- read.csv(url, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
      df$Division <- paste0("Div ", combos$div[i])
      df
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  })
  raw <- bind_rows(Filter(Negate(is.null), dfs))

  # ── Position consolidation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # MB and MH both play the middle — merge into "MB"
  raw$Pos[raw$Pos == "MH"]  <- "MB"
  # OPP and RS both play the right-side pin — merge into "OPP"
  raw$Pos[raw$Pos == "RS"]  <- "OPP"
  # Remove Libero and Libero/DS
  raw <- raw[!raw$Pos %in% c("L", "LS"), ]

  # Convert counting stats to per-game rates (divide by GP)
  # GP must be numeric and > 0; rows with missing GP are kept but will be NA
  raw$GP <- as.numeric(raw$GP)
  for (col in per_game_stats) {
    if (col %in% names(raw)) {
      raw[[col]] <- as.numeric(raw[[col]])
      raw[[col]] <- ifelse(is.na(raw$GP) | raw$GP == 0, NA, raw[[col]] / raw$GP)
    }
  }

  # Hit Pct is already a rate — no conversion needed
  raw$`Hit Pct` <- as.numeric(raw$`Hit Pct`)

  raw
}

# Position labels (post-consolidation)
pos_labels <- c(
  "OH"  = "Outside Hitter (OH)",
  "MB"  = "Middle Blocker/Hitter (MB)",
  "S"   = "Setter (S)",
  "OPP" = "Opposite/Right Side (OPP)",
  "DS"  = "Defensive Specialist (DS)"
)

# Per-game stat choices exposed in the UI
stat_choices <- c(
  "Kills/G", "Errors/G", "Total Attacks/G", "Hit Pct",
  "Assists/G", "Aces/G", "Digs/G", "Return Attempts/G",
  "Block Solos/G", "Block Assists/G", "PTS/G"
)

# Map UI label -> column name in the data frame
stat_col_map <- c(
  "Kills/G"           = "Kills",
  "Errors/G"          = "Errors",
  "Total Attacks/G"   = "Total Attacks",
  "Hit Pct"           = "Hit Pct",
  "Assists/G"         = "Assists",
  "Aces/G"            = "Aces",
  "Digs/G"            = "Digs",
  "Return Attempts/G" = "SrvAtt",
  "Block Solos/G"     = "Block Solos",
  "Block Assists/G"   = "Block Assists",
  "PTS/G"             = "PTS"
)

# ── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "purple",

  dashboardHeader(title = "NCAA Women's Volleyball"),

  dashboardSidebar(
    sidebarMenu(
      menuItem("Overview",      tabName = "overview", icon = icon("volleyball-ball")),
      menuItem("Player Stats",  tabName = "players",  icon = icon("table")),
      menuItem("Position Comp", tabName = "poscomp",  icon = icon("chart-bar")),
      menuItem("Scatter Plot",  tabName = "scatter",  icon = icon("circle-dot")),
      menuItem("Radar Chart",    tabName = "radar",    icon = icon("spider"))
    ),
    hr(),
    # No sport filter — Women's only
    checkboxGroupInput("div_filter", "Division",
                       choices  = c("Div 1", "Div 2", "Div 3"),
                       selected = "Div 1"),
    selectInput("season_filter", "Season",
                choices  = rev(paste0(2020:2024, "-", 2021:2025)),
                selected = "2024-2025"),
    hr(),
    tags$small(class = "text-muted", style = "padding-left:10px;",
               tags$em("All stats shown per game (per GP)."),
               tags$br(),
               "Data: JeffreyRStevens/ncaavolleyballr")
  ),

  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(tags$style(HTML("
      .box { border-radius: 8px; }
      .value-box .inner h3 { font-size: 28px; }
      .skin-purple .main-header .logo { font-weight: bold; }
    "))),

    tabItems(

      # ── Overview ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem("overview",
        fluidRow(
          valueBoxOutput("vb_players",   width = 3),
          valueBoxOutput("vb_teams",     width = 3),
          valueBoxOutput("vb_positions", width = 3),
          valueBoxOutput("vb_avg_pts",   width = 3)
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "Players by Position", status = "primary", solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 6, plotlyOutput("pos_dist_plot", height = 340)),
          box(title = "Avg Points per Game by Position", status = "info", solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 6, plotlyOutput("pos_pts_plot",  height = 340))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "Top 10 Scorers (PTS/G)", status = "warning", solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12, plotlyOutput("top_scorers_plot", height = 300))
        )
      ),

      # ── Player Stats Table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem("players",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 12, status = "primary",
            fluidRow(
              column(4, checkboxGroupInput("pos_filter", "Filter by Position",
                                          choices  = names(pos_labels),
                                          selected = names(pos_labels),
                                          inline   = TRUE)),
              column(4, selectInput("yr_filter", "Class Year",
                                    choices  = c("All", "Fr", "So", "Jr", "Sr"),
                                    selected = "All")),
              column(4, numericInput("min_gp", "Min Games Played", value = 10, min = 0))
            )
          )
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 12, title = "Player Season Statistics (per game)",
              status = "primary", solidHeader = TRUE,
              DTOutput("player_table"))
        )
      ),

      # ── Position Comparison ────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem("poscomp",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "primary",
              selectInput("comp_stat", "Statistic to Compare",
                          choices  = stat_choices,
                          selected = "Kills/G"),
              radioButtons("comp_type", "Summary Type",
                           choices  = c("Mean", "Median"),
                           selected = "Mean", inline = TRUE),
              checkboxGroupInput("comp_pos", "Positions to Include",
                                 choices  = names(pos_labels),
                                 selected = names(pos_labels))
          ),
          box(width = 8, title = "Position Comparison", status = "info", solidHeader = TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("comp_plot", height = 420))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 12, title = "Distribution by Position (Violin)",
              status = "warning", solidHeader = TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("violin_plot", height = 380))
        )
      ),

      # ── Scatter Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem("scatter",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, status = "primary",
              selectInput("sc_x",   "X Axis", choices = stat_choices, selected = "Kills/G"),
              selectInput("sc_y",   "Y Axis", choices = stat_choices, selected = "Digs/G"),
              selectInput("sc_col", "Color By (metric)",
                          choices  = stat_choices,
                          selected = "PTS/G"),
              tags$small(class = "text-muted",
                         tags$em("Shape = Position (always)")),
              hr(),
              checkboxGroupInput("sc_pos", "Positions",
                                 choices  = names(pos_labels),
                                 selected = names(pos_labels)),
              numericInput("sc_min_gp", "Min Games Played", value = 10, min = 0)
          ),
          box(width = 9, title = "Player Scatter Plot (per-game stats)",
              status = "info", solidHeader = TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("scatter_plot", height = 520))
        )
      )
    ,

      # ── Radar Chart ────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem("radar",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, status = "primary",
              checkboxGroupInput("radar_stats", "Stats to Include",
                                 choices  = stat_choices,
                                 selected = c("Kills/G", "Assists/G", "Digs/G",
                                              "Block Solos/G", "Aces/G", "Hit Pct")),
              hr(),
              radioButtons("radar_summary", "Summarise by",
                           choices  = c("Mean", "Median"),
                           selected = "Mean", inline = TRUE),
              hr(),
              tags$small(class = "text-muted",
                         tags$em("Values are min-max scaled (0-1) across positions so all axes are comparable."))
          ),
          box(width = 9, title = "Position Radar Chart",
              status = "info", solidHeader = TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("radar_plot", height = 560))
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

# ── Server ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # Load Women's data once; already has per-game stats
  raw_data <- reactive({
    withProgress(message = "Loading NCAA Women's Volleyball data…", value = 0.1, {
      df <- load_data()
      incProgress(0.8)
      df
    })
  })

  # Apply global sidebar filters
  filtered <- reactive({
    df <- raw_data()
    req(nrow(df) > 0)

    if (length(input$div_filter) > 0)
      df <- df[df$Division %in% input$div_filter, ]

    if (!is.null(input$season_filter) && input$season_filter != "All")
      df <- df[df$Season == input$season_filter, ]

    df <- df[df$Pos %in% names(pos_labels), ]
    df
  })

  # Helper: resolve a UI stat label to the data frame column name
  col_name <- function(label) unname(stat_col_map[label])

  # ── Overview value boxes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$vb_players <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(nrow(filtered()), "Players", icon = icon("users"), color = "purple")
  })
  output$vb_teams <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(n_distinct(filtered()$Team), "Teams", icon = icon("trophy"), color = "blue")
  })
  output$vb_positions <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(n_distinct(filtered()$Pos), "Positions", icon = icon("layer-group"), color = "orange")
  })
  output$vb_avg_pts <- renderValueBox({
    avg <- round(mean(filtered()$PTS, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    valueBox(avg, "Avg PTS/Game", icon = icon("star"), color = "green")
  })

  # Players by position bar chart
  output$pos_dist_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered() %>% count(Pos) %>% arrange(desc(n))
    plot_ly(df, x = ~Pos, y = ~n, type = "bar",
            marker = list(color = "#7b2d8b")) %>%
      layout(xaxis = list(title = "Position"),
             yaxis = list(title = "# Players"),
             plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)")
  })

  # Avg PTS/G by position
  output$pos_pts_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered() %>%
      group_by(Pos) %>%
      summarise(avg_pts = mean(PTS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      arrange(desc(avg_pts))
    plot_ly(df, x = ~reorder(Pos, avg_pts), y = ~avg_pts, type = "bar",
            marker = list(color = "#1a9641")) %>%
      layout(xaxis = list(title = "Position"),
             yaxis = list(title = "Avg PTS/G"),
             plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)")
  })

  # Top 10 scorers by PTS/G
  output$top_scorers_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered() %>%
      filter(!is.na(PTS), GP >= 5) %>%
      arrange(desc(PTS)) %>%
      slice_head(n = 10)
    plot_ly(df, x = ~reorder(Player, PTS), y = ~PTS, type = "bar",
            color = ~Pos,
            text  = ~paste0(Player, "\n", Team, " (", Pos, ")"),
            hoverinfo = "text+y") %>%
      layout(xaxis = list(title = "", tickangle = -30),
             yaxis = list(title = "PTS/G"),
             plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)")
  })

  # ── Player stats table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$player_table <- renderDT({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$pos_filter) > 0) df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$pos_filter, ]
    if (input$yr_filter != "All")     df <- df[df$Yr  == input$yr_filter, ]
    df <- df[!is.na(df$GP) & df$GP >= input$min_gp, ]

    # Round per-game columns to 3 decimal places for display
    pg_cols <- intersect(per_game_stats, names(df))
    df[pg_cols] <- lapply(df[pg_cols], function(x) round(x, 3))

    display_cols <- c("Season", "Player", "Team", "Conference", "Yr", "Pos",
                      "Division", "GP", "S",
                      "Kills", "Hit Pct", "Assists", "Aces",
                      "Digs", "Block Solos", "Block Assists", "PTS")
    display_cols <- intersect(display_cols, names(df))

    # Rename columns to make the per-game nature obvious
    pg_rename <- c(Kills = "Kills/G", Assists = "Assists/G", Aces = "Aces/G",
                   Digs = "Digs/G", PTS = "PTS/G",
                   "Block Solos" = "BlkSolo/G", "Block Assists" = "BlkAst/G")
    colnames_display <- ifelse(display_cols %in% names(pg_rename),
                               pg_rename[display_cols], display_cols)

    out <- df[, display_cols]
    names(out) <- colnames_display

    datatable(out,
              filter  = "top",
              options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE,
                             order = list(list(which(colnames_display == "PTS/G") - 1, "desc"))),
              rownames = FALSE) %>%
      formatStyle("Pos",
                  backgroundColor = styleEqual(
                    names(pos_labels),
                    c("#e41a1c","#377eb8","#984ea3","#ff7f00","#4daf4a")
                  ),
                  color = "white", fontWeight = "bold", borderRadius = "4px")
  })

  # ── Position comparison ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$comp_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$comp_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$comp_pos, ]
    cname <- col_name(input$comp_stat)

    summary_df <- df %>%
      group_by(Pos) %>%
      summarise(val = if (input$comp_type == "Mean")
                        mean(get(cname),   na.rm = TRUE)
                      else
                        median(get(cname), na.rm = TRUE),
                n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
      arrange(desc(val))

    plot_ly(summary_df, x = ~reorder(Pos, val), y = ~val, type = "bar",
            color = ~Pos, text = ~paste0("n=", n), textposition = "outside") %>%
      layout(title = paste(input$comp_type, input$comp_stat, "by Position"),
             xaxis = list(title = "Position"),
             yaxis = list(title = paste(input$comp_type, input$comp_stat)),
             showlegend = FALSE,
             plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)")
  })

  output$violin_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$comp_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$comp_pos, ]
    cname <- col_name(input$comp_stat)
    df <- df[!is.na(df[[cname]]), ]

    plot_ly(df, x = ~Pos, y = ~get(cname), type = "violin",
            color = ~Pos, box = list(visible = TRUE),
            meanline = list(visible = TRUE),
            points = "outliers") %>%
      layout(xaxis = list(title = "Position"),
             yaxis = list(title = input$comp_stat),
             showlegend = FALSE,
             plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)")
  })

  # ── Scatter plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$scatter_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$sc_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$sc_pos, ]
    df <- df[!is.na(df$GP) & df$GP >= input$sc_min_gp, ]

    cx  <- col_name(input$sc_x)
    cy  <- col_name(input$sc_y)
    cz  <- col_name(input$sc_col)   # continuous color metric
    df  <- df[!is.na(df[[cx]]) & !is.na(df[[cy]]) & !is.na(df[[cz]]), ]

    # One distinct Plotly symbol per position
    pos_symbols <- c(
      "OH"  = "circle",
      "MB"  = "square",
      "S"   = "triangle-up",
      "OPP" = "diamond",
      "DS"  = "cross"
    )

    # Color is a continuous numeric metric: use a shared colorscale so the
    # gradient is consistent across all position traces.
    col_vals  <- df[[cz]]
    col_range <- range(col_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

    # One trace per position (no need to loop over color levels since color
    # is now continuous — each point gets its own numeric color value)
    positions <- sort(unique(df$Pos))
    p <- plot_ly(type = "scatter", mode = "markers")

    for (pos in positions) {
      sub <- df[df$Pos == pos, ]
      if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
      p <- add_trace(p,
        data        = sub,
        x           = ~get(cx),
        y           = ~get(cy),
        name        = pos,
        legendgroup = pos,
        showlegend  = TRUE,
        text        = ~paste0("<b>", Player, "</b><br>",
                              Team, " | ", Pos, " | ", Yr, "<br>",
                              input$sc_x,  ": ", round(get(cx),  3), "<br>",
                              input$sc_y,  ": ", round(get(cy),  3), "<br>",
                              input$sc_col,": ", round(get(cz),  3)),
        hoverinfo   = "text",
        marker      = list(
          symbol    = pos_symbols[[pos]],
          color     = ~get(cz),          # numeric vector -> continuous gradient
          colorscale = "Viridis",
          cmin      = col_range[1],
          cmax      = col_range[2],
          showscale = (pos == positions[1]),  # show colorbar only once
          colorbar  = list(title = input$sc_col),
          size      = 9,
          opacity   = 0.8,
          line      = list(width = 0.5, color = "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)")
        )
      )
    }

    p %>% layout(
      xaxis  = list(title = input$sc_x),
      yaxis  = list(title = input$sc_y),
      legend = list(title = list(text = "<b>Shape = Position</b>")),
      plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
    )
  })

  # ── Radar chart ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$radar_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    req(length(input$radar_stats) >= 3)   # need at least 3 axes for a radar

    # Resolve UI labels to column names
    stat_cols <- stat_col_map[input$radar_stats]

    # Compute mean or median per position for each selected stat
    summary_fn <- if (input$radar_summary == "Mean") mean else median
    radar_df <- df %>%
      filter(Pos %in% names(pos_labels)) %>%
      group_by(Pos) %>%
      summarise(across(all_of(unname(stat_cols)),
                        ~summary_fn(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                .groups = "drop")

    # Min-max scale each stat column across positions (0 = lowest, 1 = highest)
    # so axes with very different magnitudes (e.g. Digs vs Hit Pct) are comparable
    for (col in unname(stat_cols)) {
      rng <- range(radar_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      if (diff(rng) == 0) {
        radar_df[[col]] <- 0.5   # all positions identical: place at mid-scale
      } else {
        radar_df[[col]] <- (radar_df[[col]] - rng[1]) / diff(rng)
      }
    }

    # Plotly scatterpolar needs the first point repeated to close the polygon
    theta_labels <- input$radar_stats   # UI labels as axis names

    pos_colors <- c(
      "OH"  = "#e41a1c",
      "MB"  = "#377eb8",
      "S"   = "#984ea3",
      "OPP" = "#ff7f00",
      "DS"  = "#4daf4a"
    )

    p <- plot_ly(type = "scatterpolar", mode = "lines+markers", fill = "toself")

    for (pos in radar_df$Pos) {
      row    <- radar_df[radar_df$Pos == pos, unname(stat_cols), drop = FALSE]
      values <- as.numeric(row)
      # Close the polygon by repeating the first value
      values_closed <- c(values, values[1])
      theta_closed  <- c(theta_labels, theta_labels[1])

      p <- add_trace(p,
        r       = values_closed,
        theta   = theta_closed,
        name    = pos,
        line    = list(color = pos_colors[[pos]], width = 2),
        marker  = list(color = pos_colors[[pos]], size = 6),
        fillcolor = paste0(
          # convert hex to rgba with transparency
          "rgba(",
          paste(strtoi(c(substr(pos_colors[[pos]], 2, 3),
                         substr(pos_colors[[pos]], 4, 5),
                         substr(pos_colors[[pos]], 6, 7)), 16L),
                collapse = ","),
          ",0.12)"
        )
      )
    }

    p %>% layout(
      polar  = list(
        radialaxis = list(
          visible = TRUE,
          range   = c(0, 1),
          tickvals = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
          ticktext = c("0", "0.25", "0.5", "0.75", "1")
        )
      ),
      legend = list(title = list(text = "<b>Position</b>")),
      plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
